title: Capitalize 'C' and 'H' in Hero headline

requirements.text: In `frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx`, update the hero headline text from 'Medina Valley custom homes' to 'Medina Valley Custom Homes' — capitalizing the 'C' in 'Custom' and the 'H' in 'Homes'.

quotes: make the "custom homes" C and H capitalized

acceptanceCriteria: The Hero section headline reads exactly 'Medina Valley Custom Homes' with capital C and capital H.
No other text, layout, or styling in Hero.tsx is changed.

constraints: Only change the capitalization of the headline text. Do not alter any other content, styling, or logic.
nonGoals: Changing any other section headlines or copy.
Modifying Hero section layout, imagery, or CTA buttons.
